caption: A person with blond hair wearing a navy blue t-shirt and gaming headphones is captured in a small overlay window, speaking and gesturing with their hands. The background of the main screen displays a sports video game "LINEUP" menu, featuring a grid of player cards with various colors and attributes. At the top of the interface, numerical values are visible, including "173,037," "14,669," "2,343,543," and "LVL 19." Menu tabs at the top include "OFFENSE," "DEFENSE," "SPECIAL TEAMS," "SPECIALISTS," "STRATEGY," and "VISUALS." At the bottom, options for "BEST LINEUP," "HELP," and "BACK" are listed. As the sequence progresses, the overlay window containing the person remains in the same position, while the main gameplay screen behind them gradually fades and becomes obscured by a deep purple gradient, eventually leaving only the person and a few remaining menu elements visible.
